channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer - MetaMask · Consensys
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Production application experience required; work on bringing transactions through the web3 ecosystem in MetaMask's core platform.

item.title: Product Manager, Mobile (MetaMask) · Consensys
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Drive iterative development of MetaMask mobile roadmap, ensuring MetaMask supports its mission of democratizing access to the decentralized web.

item.title: Senior Product Manager - MetaMask Transactions · Consensys
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Own vision and roadmap for MetaMask transaction flows; cross-functional collaboration with engineering, design, and research.

item.title: Engineering Manager - MetaMask (Backend-Platform) · Consensys
item.description: 公链/L2 · 负责人/总监 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Lead teams responsible for building core data building blocks powering user experiences; deliver high-quality, stable, performance services.

item.title: Senior Content Designer - MetaMask · Consensys
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Craft in-product content for MetaMask; collaborate with designers, PMs, researchers, and engineers on user-facing copy.

item.title: Analytics Engineer · Messari
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote - US · $120k–$150k/yr。Join Messari's on-chain data team; highly collaborative role working closely with research, product, and engineering teams to build data pipelines and dashboard

item.title: Research Analyst - Diligence · Messari
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote - US · $110k–$120k/yr。2-3 years as Research Analyst or Data Engineer in crypto or TradFi; conduct deep structured research on crypto assets and protocols.

item.title: Data Engineer · Messari
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote - US · $130k–$160k/yr。Ensure analysts can access data smoothly; expand and optimize data infra and pipeline architecture for blockchain analytics.

item.title: Senior Front-End Engineer · Messari
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote - US · $140k–$180k/yr。Build analytical platforms that help users learn, analyze, and participate in web3; strong React/TypeScript experience required.

item.title: Software Engineer, Smart Contracts · Aptos Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · $180k–$300k/yr。Build novel and capable smart contracts on Move for the Aptos ecosystem; partner with external and internal customers across one or more programming languages.

item.title: Software Engineer, Blockchain Core · Aptos Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · $180k–$300k/yr。Build production-grade L1 blockchain, working on performance, reliability, scalability, decentralization, and incentive mechanisms.

item.title: Production Engineer · Aptos Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · $180k–$250k/yr。Develop core blockchain node software and ecosystem infrastructure; implement node reference deployment and build automation tools.

item.title: Machine Learning Engineer · Aptos Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · $180k–$280k/yr。Work with platform and language development teams to build a first-in-class Move language and Aptos DApp co-pilot AI experience.

item.title: Data Engineer · Aptos Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · $160k–$220k/yr。Expand and optimize data infra and data pipeline architecture for the growing Aptos Analytics team.

item.title: Blockchain Engineer · Trust Machines
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Talented and mission-oriented blockchain engineer to contribute to the Stacks core protocol; remote-first team building on Bitcoin.

item.title: Growth Analyst · Okcoin
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote - US · 面议。Analyze growth metrics and drive user acquisition insights for Okcoin's US crypto exchange platform.

item.title: Sr. Blockchain & Risk Investigator · Okcoin
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Austin, TX, USA · 面议。Senior blockchain and risk investigator managing on-chain risk and compliance investigations for Okcoin's US exchange.

item.title: Product Manager, New Grad · Okcoin
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · San Jose, CA, USA · $125k–$155k/yr。New grad product manager role at Okcoin; own end-to-end delivery of bank and payment partner integrations.

item.title: Senior Protocol Engineer · Matter Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Build zkSync, credibly neutral open-source technology stack on Ethereum; advance zero-knowledge proof protocols and zkEVM.

item.title: Staff Engineer (Cryptography) · Matter Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Advanced cryptography engineering for zkSync; deep expertise in zero-knowledge proofs, ZK-SNARKs, and formal proof systems.

item.title: Blockchain Engineer · Matter Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Build and maintain blockchain infrastructure for zkSync; experience with EVM, Solidity, and distributed systems required.

item.title: Protocol Engineer · Matter Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Protocol engineering for zkSync Layer-2; contribute to ZK proof generation and Ethereum compatibility layers.

item.title: Developer Relations Engineer · Matter Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Developer relations and ecosystem growth for zkSync; build relationships with dApp developers and create educational content.

item.title: Blockchain Research Analyst · Allium
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Conduct on-chain data research and analysis at Allium, a blockchain data company focused on making blockchain data accurate, simple, and fast.

item.title: Site Reliability Engineer · Anagram
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote, USA · 面议。Support and scale critical Web3 infrastructure at Anagram, a digital assets holding company; SRE experience with blockchain clients required.

item.title: Infrastructure and Technical Support Engineer - Asia / US time zones · Clearmatics
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote / London, UK · 面议。Infrastructure support for blockchain systems; familiarity with Ethereum-like infrastructure key; supporting Asia / US time zones.

item.title: Software Engineer, Developer Experience · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Advance the developer experience for the Chainlink ecosystem; globally remote role on rapidly growing Chainlink Labs engineering team.

item.title: Staff Software Engineer, Data Feeds · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Staff-level engineering on Chainlink Data Feeds; build and maintain PB-scale decentralized oracle data infrastructure.

item.title: Strategic Sales · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。User acquisition and account management for Chainlink Labs; develop strategic partnerships across DeFi and enterprise blockchain verticals.

item.title: Developer Relations Engineer · Arbitrum Foundation
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Enthusiastic and skilled Developer Relations Engineer to become a key member of the Arbitrum Foundation team; build developer community.

item.title: Data Engineer · Arbitrum Foundation
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Develop and optimize SQL queries for data extraction; create dashboards using Dune Analytics, Allium, and Flipside for blockchain data insights.

item.title: Application Security Engineer (Java Code Audit) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Conduct manual source code business security audits and excavate unknown security vulnerabilities in Java programs at Binance.

item.title: Smart Contract Security Engineer (Security Audit) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Conduct pen testing and security reviews for blockchain products; smart contract auditing across multiple chains at Binance.

item.title: Senior Security Operations Engineer (SOC) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Handle 24/7 security incident response; formulation and implementation of security response plans for Binance's global SOC operations.

item.title: Senior Data Scientist (Content, Feeds, Recommendation) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Leverage PB-level data and state-of-the-art ML infrastructure for content recommendation and feeds personalization at Binance.

item.title: On Chain Research Data Analyst · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。3+ years experience in data engineering, modeling, and ETL; analyze on-chain data for research insights at Binance.

item.title: Infrastructure Security Engineer (DevSecOps) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote, Worldwide · 面议。Secure and automate Binance's platform; own security posture of cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and production systems.

item.title: VP, Regulatory Counsel · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Hong Kong, Hong Kong SAR · 面议。The Legal team provides legal and regulatory advice to ensure that all CDC products and services are compliant per local

item.title: Trading Java Developer · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Singapore, Singapore · 面议。The Quant Trading team is responsible for trading and managing risks associated with different crypto products, includin

item.title: Trading Initiatives & Business Manager · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Singapore, Singapore · 面议。We are looking for a commercially curious and execution-focused Trading Initiatives & Business Manager to join our Tradi
